quality_highlights.note: Excellent error messages with numbered fix steps and concrete examples
run-failure message is a best-practice model: describes issue, links to logs, no {status} placeholder

single_file_improvements.issue: description frontmatter is generic ('Triggers in GitHub Agentic Workflows'); introductory paragraph is terse and doesn't highlight gh-aw-specific enhancements
run-failure message uses raw {status} placeholder and provides no actionable guidance; inconsistent with the better pattern in archie.md
